subject: Excited to connect at the conference, Priya Nair
body:
Hi Priya Nair,

Saw you'll be at the conference and noticed your work at Quanta. Would love to swap notes on Salesforce, automation.

[Lightfern will polish this in Gmail]

follow-up in Gmail. Human reviews/polishes in Gmail, then sends.
